1.title: Splunk On-Prem Forwarder Persistent Queue Size
1.query:
timeseries queue_size = avg(com.splunkcloud.forwarder.queue_size),
  by: { dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| sort arrayAvg(queue_size) desc
| limit 20

2.title: Splunk Cloud Indexer Availability
2.query:
timeseries availability = avg(com.splunkcloud.indexer.availability),
  by: { dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| sort arrayAvg(availability) desc
| limit 20

3.title: Splunk Cloud Indexer Available Count
3.query:
timeseries available = avg(com.splunkcloud.indexer.available),
  by: { dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| sort arrayAvg(available) desc
| limit 20

4.title: Splunk Cloud Total Possible Indexers
4.query:
timeseries total = avg(com.splunkcloud.indexer.total),
  by: { dt.entity.host }
| fieldsAdd host_name = entityName(dt.entity.host)
| sort arrayAvg(total) desc
| limit 20
